news.t: These underperforming groups may deliver AI-electric appeal. Here's why.
In Trump's market, oil and gas stocks have not been the big energy winners

holdings.infoBox: ZAP is an equity ETF with a total of 46 individual holdings. The top holdings are Bloom Energy stock at 5.28%, Quanta Services at 4.81%, Dominion Energy at 4.34%, Eaton Corporation at 4.00%, and The Southern Company at 3.95%.

overview.description: The Global X U.S. Electrification ETF (ZAP) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Global X US Electrification index. The fund tracks market-cap selected and weighted index of US listed companies in developed markets involved in the industry of electrification. This includes companies involved in conventional and alternative electricity, and smart grid technologies. ZAP was launched on Dec 17, 2024 and is issued by Global X.

data.title: These underperforming groups may deliver AI-electric appeal. Here's why.
data.text: Industrial and infrastructure stocks may soon share the spotlight with the artificial intelligence trade.

data.title: In Trump's market, oil and gas stocks have not been the big energy winners
data.text: The Trump administration has promoted an energy policy favorable to oil and gas, but the utilities sector within the S&P 500 has been the much stronger performer this year. The Utilities Select Sector...

data.title: ETF Edge: Emerging markets having their moment and the latest trends in energy funds
data.text: After more than a decade of lackluster performance, established international and emerging markets are growing in popularity. What's driving this, and what could derail this investor enthusiasm?
